sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Ishares Iboxx $ High Yield Corporate Bond Etf Options Spot-On: On December 26th, 56,318 Contracts Were Traded, With 8.09 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On December 26th, active options trading was observed for the iShares iBoxx $ High Yield Corporate Bond ETF (HYG.US), with a total of 56,318 options contracts traded. Call options slightly outnumbered put options, accounting for 52.51% of transactions. The open interest for HYG.US options reached approximately 8.09 million contracts, representing 82.03% of the average over the past 30 trading days.

feed.title: PACCAR (NASDAQ:PCAR) Upgraded by Wall Street Zen to "Hold" Rating
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded PACCAR (NASDAQ:PCAR) from a "sell" to a "hold" rating, though the consensus among analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with a $111.04 target price. PACCAR recently reported mixed quarterly results, missing EPS expectations but beating revenue estimates, with a year-over-year revenue decline of 20.7%. Company insiders and hedge funds have also made recent adjustments to their positions in the stock.

feed.title: Henry Schein, Inc. (NASDAQ:HSIC) Receives Average Recommendation of "Hold" from Analysts
feed.summary: Henry Schein, Inc. (NASDAQ:HSIC) currently holds an average "Hold" recommendation from 14 analysts, with a 12-month price target of $76.92. Despite the consensus, some analysts have issued bullish revisions, including an "outperform" rating from Evercore ISI with a $90 target and an "overweight" initiation from Barclays at $86. Institutional investors hold approximately 96.62% of the company, with significant recent purchases from firms like Ameriprise, Norges Bank, Schroder, and Bank of America.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) has received a consensus "Buy" recommendation from 41 brokerages, with an average 1-year target price of $313.0357. This positive outlook is supported by recent earnings that beat expectations and strong growth in AI and cloud services. However, a cautionary note is the recent insider selling by senior executives, including CEO Sundar Pichai, totaling approximately $64 million in the last 90 days.

feed.title: Kosmos Energy Ltd. (NYSE:KOS) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Hold" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Kosmos Energy Ltd. (NYSE:KOS) has received a consensus "Hold" recommendation from eight brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $2.2917. Recent analyst target cuts from firms like Mizuho and Goldman Sachs, alongside the stock trading near its 52-week low and reporting negative financials, reflect a mixed and weakening outlook despite significant institutional ownership. The company, an independent oil and gas exploration firm, has a high debt-to-equity ratio and missed its recent earnings per share and revenue estimates.

feed.title: Verizon (VZ) Stock News Today: Dividend, Frontier Deal Updates, Analyst Forecasts — and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive update on Verizon (VZ) stock, covering key drivers as the year 2025 concludes. It details the company's Q3 earnings, reiterated full-year outlook, and the ongoing progress of its major fiber acquisition of Frontier. The analysis also touches on Verizon's restructuring efforts, bond activities, dividend details, and current analyst forecasts, highlighting the stock's position as an income and stability play amidst market dynamics.

feed.title: Hovnanian Enterprises (NYSE:HOV) Downgraded to Sell Rating by Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Hovnanian Enterprises (NYSE:HOV) has been downgraded by Wall Street Zen from a "hold" to a "sell" rating, contributing to a consensus "Reduce" rating among analysts. This downgrade follows the company's significant quarterly earnings miss, reporting ($0.51) EPS against a $0.63 consensus, and a 16.5% year-over-year revenue decrease. The stock's performance reflects these concerns, trading below its 50- and 200-day moving averages.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands (NYSE:LVS) Lowered to "Buy" Rating by Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has downgraded Las Vegas Sands (NYSE:LVS) from a "strong-buy" to a "buy" rating, although the average analyst consensus remains "Moderate Buy" with a $68.52 price target. This downgrade comes amidst significant insider selling, with major shareholder Miriam Adelson and COO Patrick Dumont offloading millions of dollars worth of shares in recent months. Despite the insider activity, several firms have raised their price targets for LVS into the mid-$60s.

feed.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) Upgraded to Hold at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen upgraded Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) from "sell" to "hold," though the overall analyst consensus remains "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $109.30. The company slightly surpassed Q3 earnings expectations and provided FY2025 EPS guidance, while institutional investors own a significant portion of the stock. Various other research firms have issued mixed ratings and price targets for FRT, reflecting a diverse outlook on the real estate investment trust.

feed.title: Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from 28 brokerages, with 23 advising "Buy" and 5 recommending "Hold." The average 12-month price target set by analysts is $58.5909. The company recently exceeded quarterly EPS expectations and reported a 10.8% year-over-year revenue increase, with institutional investors holding approximately 70.7% of its stock.

feed.title: Coca‑Cola Stock (NYSE: KO) News Roundup: CEO Transition, Costa Coffee Talks, Analyst Forecasts, and What to Watch When Markets Reopen
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive news roundup for Coca-Cola (NYSE: KO), covering key topics such as the upcoming CEO transition to Henrique Braun, ongoing talks regarding the potential sale of Costa Coffee, and the expected $1 billion impairment charge from its Africa bottling stake sale. It also analyzes KO's Q3 2025 financial results, dividend consistency as a "Dividend King," and current analyst forecasts, advising investors on what to monitor as markets reopen.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) Downgraded to Sell Rating by Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen downgraded Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) from a "hold" to a "sell" rating in a report issued on Saturday, December 27, 2025. Despite this downgrade, the broader consensus among analysts remains a "Buy," with firms like UBS, Scotiabank, and Evercore maintaining positive ratings or raising price targets, leading to a consensus target price of $188.76. The oil and natural gas company recently surpassed quarterly earnings expectations and reported significant revenue growth, though a director recently sold a substantial number of shares.

feed.title: Waste Management plans to build plant to turn landfill methane into useable natural gas
feed.summary: Waste Management (WM) plans to construct a new renewable natural gas plant at the Denver Arapahoe Disposal Site in Colorado. This project, a partnership with the City of Denver and Arapahoe County, aims to capture 98% of landfill methane, converting it into natural gas capable of powering almost 15,000 homes and WM's trash collection vehicles. The initiative is expected to significantly improve air quality by reducing methane and other harmful pollutants currently flared off.

feed.title: MSFT vs. ORCL: Which Enterprise Cloud & AI Stock Has Better Upside?
feed.summary: Microsoft (MSFT) and Oracle (ORCL) are both significant players in the enterprise cloud and AI sectors, investing heavily in infrastructure. While both reported strong fiscal results, Microsoft is favored as the superior investment due to its diversified business model, consistent revenue growth, and strong AI monetization capabilities. Oracle faces challenges with financing its massive capital expenditures and converting its backlog efficiently.

feed.title: MSCI Stock Surges 6.1% With A 7-day Winning Spree On Recent Analyst Upgrades
feed.summary: MSCI stock has risen 6.1% on the back of recent analyst upgrades, extending a 7-day winning streak. This surge highlights positive market sentiment and potentially increased investor confidence in the company.

feed.title: Japan Refunds Overpaid Tax On LogProstyle’s Dividend
feed.summary: LogProstyle Inc., a Japanese real estate and hospitality company, has announced that shareholders are eligible for a refund of overpaid Japanese withholding income tax on a recent cash dividend. This decision follows consultations with Japan’s National Tax Agency, clarifying the tax refund process. Shareholders must complete an application process to receive the refund.

feed.title: Stifel lifts Expeditors (EXPD) target amid emphasis on quality transport names
feed.summary: Stifel has raised its price target for Expeditors International (EXPD) to $123, maintaining a "Hold" rating. This adjustment reflects Stifel's continued focus on quality names within the transport sector, even as they anticipate ongoing challenges for air and ocean freight in the upcoming year. The firm's positive stance highlights Expeditors' strong market position amidst a volatile industry outlook.

feed.title: Levi & Korsinsky Invites Investors to SueWallSt After CarMax, Inc. Stock Collapse
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky has announced a class action lawsuit against CarMax, Inc. for alleged securities fraud that impacted investors who lost money between June 20, 2025, and November 5, 2025. Investors affected by the stock collapse are encouraged to contact Levi & Korsinsky to pursue potential claims. The firm, a leading securities litigation specialist, offers a podcast and WhatsApp channel for updates on class action news.

feed.title: Home Depot Stock (HD) Update: Year-End Trading, 2026 Outlook, and What Investors Should Watch Before Monday’s Open

It highlights the company's strategic focus on "Pro" customers, its preliminary guidance versus analysts' expectations, and the critical "Market Recovery Case" for potential upside. feed.title: Salesforce (CRM) Stock News Today: Agentforce AI Momentum, Analyst Price Targets, and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open
feed.summary: Salesforce (CRM) shares are hovering around $266, driven by momentum in its Agentforce AI platform and capital return program. The company raised its fiscal 2026 guidance based on accelerating AI product demand, with Agentforce + Data 360 ARR reaching nearly $1.4 billion. Investors are now focused on how this AI adoption translates into sustained, paid growth and wider market sentiment ahead of Monday's market open and into the new year.

feed.title: Merck (MRK) Stock Update: FDA Fast-Track Vouchers, TrumpRx Pricing Deal, and Analyst Targets as Wall Street Heads Into New Year Week
feed.summary: Merck (MRK) shares are gaining momentum heading into the new year, driven by its inclusion in a U.S. drug-pricing deal and new FDA priority vouchers accelerating its drug review timelines. The company is actively diversifying its pipeline beyond Keytruda through acquisitions and new oncology data, aiming to address long-term growth concerns. While analysts anticipate modest upside, the stock's future hinges on successful pipeline execution and navigation of policy risks.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (PG) Stock Update: Latest Price, News, Analyst Forecasts, and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive update on Procter & Gamble (PG) stock, covering its latest price, market performance, and investor considerations heading into the next trading session. It details the challenges of navigating defensive demand versus cautious consumer behavior, the impact of tariffs, and the company's dividend record. The report also includes analyst forecasts and key dates for investors to monitor, such as upcoming earnings and the CEO transition.

feed.title: PepsiCo Stock (NASDAQ: PEP) Update: Elliott Pressure, 2026 Outlook, Dividend Tailwinds—and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open
feed.summary: PepsiCo (NASDAQ: PEP) is facing activist pressure from Elliott Investment Management, driving actions to improve competitiveness in North America through cost cuts, pricing tiers, and product line simplification. The company has reaffirmed its 2025 financial outlook and provided a preliminary positive 2026 outlook. Investors are also monitoring legal headlines regarding alleged pricing inflation with Walmart and the company's consistent dividend increases.

feed.title: Holiday Travel Chaos: JetBlue, Delta, American, United Flights Cancelled As Winter Storm Devin Strikes Northeast US
feed.summary: A powerful winter storm named Devin caused widespread flight cancellations and delays across the Northeast U.S. on Friday, disrupting holiday travel. Thousands of flights were affected, with New York airports experiencing the worst disruptions. Several airlines, including JetBlue, Delta, American, and United, canceled hundreds of flights, and states of emergency were declared in New York and New Jersey.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Trims Costco (COST) Target Amid Mixed Retail Backdrop
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Edward Kelly lowered Costco Wholesale Corporation's (NASDAQ: COST) price target to $900 from $1,000, maintaining an Equal Weight rating due to a mixed retail outlook for 2026. Despite the cautious stance on the broader sector, Costco's membership model and strong renewal rates, especially in the US and Canada, continue to provide earnings visibility and support ongoing growth. The company's expansion plans, including opening 28 new warehouses in fiscal 2026, underline its sustained investment and focus on market durability.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuits Against Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. - ARE
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler is reminding investors who suffered losses exceeding $100,000 in Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE) to file lead plaintiff applications by January 26, 2026. This class action lawsuit alleges the company failed to disclose material information between January 27, 2025, and October 27, 2025, leading to a significant stock price drop after disappointing Q3 2025 financial results and a $323.9 million real estate impairment charge.

feed.title: F5 Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuits Against F5, Inc. - FFIV
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler is alerting investors of F5, Inc. (NasdaqGS: FFIV) who suffered losses exceeding $100,000 to a lead plaintiff deadline of February 17, 2026, in a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges F5 and its executives failed to disclose material information between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025, leading to a significant stock price drop after disappointing Q4 fiscal year 2025 results and a security breach involving its BIG-IP product were revealed. Investors are encouraged to seek legal options and learn more through ClaimsFiler.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuits Against Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. - ARE
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler is alerting investors of Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE) who suffered losses exceeding $100,000 to file lead plaintiff applications by January 26, 2026. This class action lawsuit alleges that Alexandria and its executives failed to disclose material information, leading to a significant stock price drop following the announcement of lower-than-expected Q3 2025 financial results. The decline was attributed to reduced occupancy rates, slower leasing, and a substantial real estate impairment charge.

feed.title: CarMax Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuits Against CarMax, Inc. - KMX
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler reminds investors that the lead plaintiff deadline in a securities class action lawsuit against CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) is January 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges CarMax failed to disclose material information between June 20, 2025, and November 5, 2025, leading to an $11.5 per share drop following its Q2 FY2026 financial results announcement. Investors with losses exceeding $100,000 are encouraged to contact ClaimsFiler for evaluation of their legal options.

feed.title: NIO's battery asset operator Mirattery completes 1 billion yuan Series C round
feed.summary: Mirattery, NIO's battery asset operator, has successfully closed a Series C funding round, raising nearly 1 billion CNY. The financing includes new contributions from founding shareholders and state-owned capital investors, broadening support for its battery operations and R&D. Mirattery manages over 35 GWh of battery assets for more than 500,000 NIO users, central to NIO's Battery-as-a-Service model.

feed.title: The Eastern Company Declares 342nd Consecutive Quarterly Cash Dividend
feed.summary: The Eastern Company (NASDAQ: EML) announced its 342nd consecutive quarterly cash dividend of eleven cents ($0.11) per share. This dividend is payable on March 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 13, 2026. The company manages industrial businesses with operations in several countries.

feed.title: MAIA Biotechnology, Inc. (NYSEAMERICAN:MAIA) Short Interest Up 144.9% in December
feed.summary: MAIA Biotechnology (NYSEAMERICAN:MAIA) experienced a significant increase in short interest during December, rising by 144.9% to 1,685,137 shares, representing about 6.7% of the stock sold short. This surge in short interest occurred despite notable insider buying, with directors Ngar Yee Louie and Stan Smith acquiring substantial shares in the company. The stock also saw a 6.1% price increase to $1.57, even after a recent quarterly EPS miss and analysts forecasting a negative full-year EPS.

feed.title: Hong Kong’s Operation Santa Claus boosted by Morgan Stanley’s enduring support
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley is set to be Operation Santa Claus's top corporate supporter for the ninth consecutive year, reinforcing a 29-year partnership through its "building bridges" campaign. The firm contributed HK$8.8 million this year, benefiting multiple charities and disaster relief, illustrating its long-term commitment to community giving. This ongoing support reflects the company's belief in empathy, understanding, and shared responsibility.

feed.title: Thousands of Southeast Michigan residents without power due to ice on utility lines
feed.summary: Thousands of residents in Southeast Michigan are without power due to ice accumulating on utility lines, causing outages. DTE Energy is working to restore electricity for over 14,000 customers, with Consumers Energy reporting an additional 24,000 outages in Mid-Michigan. The freezing rain on Friday also created hazardous driving conditions.

feed.title: JFK, LaGuardia flight delays live updates: Latest Delta, JetBlue, Qatar, American, Southwest status today | Hindustan Times
feed.summary: A winter storm in New York on Friday caused widespread flight disruptions at JFK, LaGuardia, and Newark airports, leading to thousands of delays and cancellations. JetBlue and Delta Air Lines experienced the highest number of cancellations. The National Weather Service issued a warning for 5 to 9 inches of snow and urged extreme caution for travelers.

feed.title: Key facts: Biohaven Ltd. develops BHV-7000 for epilepsy; J.P. Morgan reports poor trial results
feed.summary: Biohaven Ltd. (BHVN) is developing BHV-7000 for epilepsy, with analysts recommending a strong buy due to its potential and safety despite recent negative pipeline news. However, J.P. Morgan reported poor trial results for Biohaven, suggesting these results may not improve the company's fundamentals or market outlook. A data presentation for the drug is scheduled for January 2026.

feed.title: Thousands of Southeast Michigan residents without power due to ice on utility lines
feed.summary: Thousands of residents in Southeast Michigan are currently without power due to ice accumulating on utility lines following Friday's freezing rain. DTE Energy is working to restore service for over 14,000 customers, primarily in Oakland County, with Consumers Energy reporting outages for an additional 24,000 people in Mid-Michigan. Restoration for many DTE customers is expected between Friday night and early Saturday.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Stock (GS) Outlook: Year-End Rally, M&A Momentum, and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs (GS) is ending 2025 with shares near $907, driven by a strong year-end market, a rebound in M&A and equity underwriting, and a more favorable regulatory environment for banks. Investors are looking for continued proof of performance, especially with analyst price targets often below current trading levels. Key watchpoints for early 2026 include interest rate shifts, continued dealmaking headlines, regulatory developments, and the company's Q4 2025 earnings report on January 15, 2026.

feed.title: MGM Grand to reopen Avenue Café in January
feed.summary: The MGM Grand in Las Vegas is reopening its popular Avenue Café in January, replacing the temporary Netflix BITES space. This breakfast and lunch restaurant will resume operations on January 12th, while Netflix BITES concludes its one-year run on January 4th. Other brunch options remain available at the resort.

feed.title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Surged Following Strong Performance
feed.summary: TE Connectivity (NYSE:TEL) saw strong performance in Q3 2025, driven by faster-than-expected revenue growth in data centers and energy utilities, as well as margin expansion from its Industrial Solutions segment. Impax US Sustainable Economy Fund highlighted the stock, noting its 3.19% one-month return and 59.38% gain over the last 52 weeks, closing at $231.90 per share on December 24, 2025.

feed.summary: On December 26th, the ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF (TQQQ.US) experienced significant options trading, with 263.1K contracts traded and a total open interest of 1.54 million contracts. feed.title: Rockwell Automation, Inc. Stock Analysis: AI Growth and What’s Next
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) shows strong growth driven by AI integration in industrial automation, reflected in its surpassing analyst EPS expectations and a 39.29% year-to-date stock performance. While short-term projections by Meyka AI suggest a potential dip, the long-term outlook remains optimistic due to robust financials and strategic positioning. The company’s continued innovation in AI for manufacturing efficiency and safety positions it as a vital player in the industrial sector.

feed.title: Citigroup Stock (NYSE: C) News and Outlook: Citi’s 2025 Rally, Regulatory Relief, and What to Watch Before the Next Session
feed.summary: Citigroup (NYSE: C) is concluding 2025 with significant momentum, marked by a substantial stock rally driven by regulatory optimism and improved business trends. Despite market subdued at year-end, catalysts like a "turnaround" narrative gaining Wall Street buy-in and easing regulatory hurdles are attracting investors. The upcoming Q4 2025 earnings report on January 14, 2026, will be crucial for assessing continued progress and management's outlook for 2026.

feed.title: GOOG Stock Update: Alphabet Class C Shares in Focus After the $4.75B Intersect Deal, AI Spending Surge, and Antitrust Headlines
feed.summary: Alphabet's Class C shares (GOOG) are under investor scrutiny due to its strategic $4.75 billion acquisition of Intersect for AI infrastructure, rising capital expenditures, and ongoing regulatory pressures. The company's strong ad revenue and Cloud growth are positive, but escalating AI investment costs and significant antitrust actions in both the U.S. and EU pose key challenges. Investors are balancing the need for AI scale with capex discipline and the potential impact of regulatory remedies on Alphabet's business model.

feed.title: UiPath, Ramaco Resources And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
feed.summary: U.S. stock futures are slightly lower, but several companies are seeing significant movement in after-hours trading. UiPath (PATH) shares gained after announcing its entry into the S&P Midcap 400, while Ramaco Resources (METC) jumped following a $100 million stock repurchase plan. Citius Pharmaceuticals (CTXR) also showed strong gains after reporting better-than-expected earnings.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Stock Near Record Levels Into Year-End: What’s Driving the Rally, Key News, and What to Watch Before the Next Market Session
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) stock is approaching record levels as 2025 ends, driven by a year-end rally, strong capital markets activity, and rising net interest income guidance. However, investors are keenly watching the bank's projected 2026 expenses, the impact of potential Federal Reserve rate cuts, and the upcoming Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings report. The article highlights key factors for investors to monitor, including Fed minutes, year-end market liquidity, and ongoing strategic developments like the exploration of cryptocurrency trading.

feed.title: OWL DEADLINE ALERT: Blue Owl Capital Inc. Investors Urged to Contact Kirby McInerney LLP About Class Action Lawsuit
feed.summary: Kirby McInerney LLP is reminding Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE:OWL) investors of a February 2, 2026, deadline to seek lead plaintiff status in a federal securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Blue Owl failed to disclose significant pressure on its asset base from business development company redemptions and undisclosed liquidity issues, leading to stock price declines following several negative announcements. Investors who purchased Blue Owl securities between February 6, 2025, and November 16, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their rights.

feed.summary: First Trust High Yield Opportunities 2027 Term Fund has announced a monthly common share distribution of $0.125 per share for January. This press release indicates a regular payout for investors in the fund. There is also an unrelated market update in the same snippet.
